# Ublituximab 相關新聞

[← 返回新聞總覽]({{ '/news/' | relative_url }})

---

<p class="key-answer" data-question="Ublituximab 有什麼相關新聞？">
<strong>Ublituximab</strong> 目前有 <strong>4 則</strong>相關新聞報導，預測適應症 20 個。
</p>

<div class="key-takeaway">
本頁整合 Ublituximab 的 AI 預測適應症與最新健康新聞，橘色標示的適應症表示近期有相關新聞報導。
</div>

<div class="drug-info-card">
<strong>藥物資訊</strong>
<ul>
<li><strong>原適應症</strong>：Briumvi is indicated for the treatment of adult patients with relapsing forms of multiple sclerosis (RMS) with active disease defined by clinical or imaging features.</li>
<li><strong>證據等級</strong>：L5</li>
<li><strong>預測適應症</strong>（20 個）：<ul>
<li>diabetic cataract（98.6%）</li>
<li>immature cataract（98.5%）</li>
<li>tetanic cataract（98.5%）</li>
<li>craniostenosis cataract（98.5%）</li>
<li>mature cataract（98.5%）</li>
<li>diabetes mellitus type 2 associated cataract（98.5%）</li>
<li>nuclear senile cataract（98.5%）</li>
<li>cortical cataract（98.5%）</li>
<li>senile cataract（98.4%）</li>
<li>diabetic retinopathy（98.3%）</li>
<li>antithrombin deficiency type 2（98.2%）</li>
<li>factor 5 excess with spontaneous thrombosis（98.2%）</li>
<li>heparin cofactor 2 deficiency（98.2%）</li>
<li>severe nonproliferative diabetic retinopathy（98.0%）</li>
<li>thrombophilia（97.9%）</li>
<li>diffuse gastric adenocarcinoma（95.6%）</li>
<li>hemorrhagic disease of newborn（95.5%）</li>
<li>gastric adenocarcinoma and proximal polyposis of the stomach（94.9%）</li>
<li>gastric carcinoma（94.9%）</li>
<li>microinvasive gastric cancer（94.8%）</li>
</ul></li>
</ul>
<p><a href="{{ '/drugs/ublituximab/' | relative_url }}">查看完整藥物報告 →</a></p>
</div>
